title: Potato PVP
description: A PVP modpack for the potato pcs like mine ;-; (Sodium)
body:
PLEASE TWEAK YOUR DISTANT HORIZONS SETTINGS, YOU WILL BE RENDERING 256 CHUNKS IF YOU DONT!



A lightweight(ish), PvP-focused modpack engineered for high performance on low-end setups—even laptops powered by hope. Packed with essential combat mods, Sodium-based optimization, and crystal-clear clarity enhancements, this is your competitive stack without compromise.

BY THE WAY: I ADD MORE MODS HERE AND THERE, THIS MAY NOT BE A FULL LIST :/

FPS Mods (Sodium & Optimization Stack)
- Sodium, Reese’s Sodium Options, ModernFix, FerriteCore, Lithium, BadOptimizations, ThreadTweak, FastQuit, MemoryLeakFix, More Culling, Entity Culling, Krypton, C2ME, VMP, Dynamic FPS, Enhanced Block Entities, Chunky, Video Tape, Noisium, Noxesium, Exordium, Indium.

Network & Input Tweaks
- Fast IP Ping, Packet Fixer, Mouse Tweaks, Controlling.

Quality-of-Life & UI Mods
- Mod Menu, Custom FOV, Searchables, Join AutoSprint, FPS Display, Zoomify, Ok Zoomer.

Combat HUDs & PvP Essentials
- TierTagger, PotionCounter, TotemCounter, Uku’s Armor HUD, Totem Tweaks, Marlow’s Crystal Optimizer, AppleSkin, Shield Statuses, HitColor, Effect Timer Plus, TipTapShow.

Shaders & Resource Packs
- Complementary Reimagined Shader, Insanity Shader, Potato Shaders,
- No Explosion Particles, No Explosion Sounds, Purplefault.

Powered by Iris for shader compatibility and clarity.


Libraries & Config APIs
- Cloth Config API, YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL), Fabric API, Fabric Language Kotlin, ukulib, MidnightLib,  Forge Config API Port.

Sodium Edition Benchmarked-

Tested against Lunar, Fabulously Optimized, Simply Optimized, and Feather—Potato PvP Sodium Edition consistently pulled higher FPS across the board.
Even my toaster noticed the difference :D

Want the Vulkan edition instead? [Grab it here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vulkan-chapter-of-potato-pvp)
